title: Mastercard to Acquire Stablecoin Tech Firm BVNK for Up to $1.8 Billion
message_html: Mastercard to Acquire Stablecoin Tech Firm BVNK for Up to $1.8 Billion ...
snippet: Mastercard said Tuesday that it will acquire stablecoin infrastructure firm BVNK in an effort to connect fiat and crypto payment rails.

title: Theo Taps Gold Futures for Yield-Bearing Stablecoin Amid $100 Million Raise
message_html: Theo Taps Gold Futures for Yield-Bearing Stablecoin Amid $100 Million Raise ...
snippet: Tokenization platform Theo plans to introduce a "gold-powered" stablecoin, which is set to generate yield from two independent sources.

title: Ripple Announces Full Institutional Expansion Across Brazil Covering Payments, Custody, Prime Brokerage, and Treasury, Files for VASP License
message_html: Ripple Announces Full Institutional Expansion Across Brazil Covering Payments, Custody, Prime Brokerage, and Treasury, Files for VASP License ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): NEW: @Ripple announces full institutional expansion across Brazil covering payments, custody, prime brokerage, and treasury, in addition to filing for a VASP license with the country's Central Bank.

title: Thunes brings stablecoins to 11,500 banks via existing Swift connections
message_html: Thunes brings stablecoins to 11,500 banks via existing Swift connections ...
snippet: Thunes, the Smart Superhighway to move money around the world, today unveils a major breakthrough in cross-border payments by offering its Pay-to-Stablecoin-Wallets solution to banks globally through their existing Swift connectivity.
